name: NGL ENERGY PARTNERS LP 9.625% Class C Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative  Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units representing  limited partner interests
summary: NGL Energy Partners LP is a diversified midstream energy company that transports, stores, blends and provides other services with respect to crude oil, natural gas liquids, refined products and other products. The company owns and operates extensive midstream infrastructure and provides services throughout the United States and Canada. NGL Energy Partners is headquartered in Tulsa, Oklahoma.
